title: Mod Menu Babric
description: A mod menu for the Babric modding toolchain
body:
A fork of the [b1.7.3 version of Ornithe Mod Menu](https://github.com/OrnitheMC/modmenu/tree/b1.7) for Babric.

Mod Menu lets you view all your installed mods and libraries together with their descriptions, authors and links to their websites or issue trackers.

![Screenshot of the mod menu screen](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d0d577480289d2c4c06810e39d708622f51d335d.png)
